This '''[[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]''' was present at the briefing led by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] prior to the [[First Battle of Kamino]]. He flew a [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite''-class light interceptor]] with a team of other Jedi as the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] defense of [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]].
